message:
fix(web): remove duplicate opacity animation in CollapsibleContent

The inner motion.div was animating opacity from 0→1 while the outer
motion.div already handles opacity transitions. This created competing
animations. Now the inner wrapper only animates the y-axis slide,
letting the outer handle opacity for cleaner, more predictable behavior.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
